summary: The passage describes methods for creating invisible ink using natural substances such as egg whites, alum, and gall nuts, applied to paper or wood, with instructions on rendering the writing visible through chemical treatment.

entities.name: egg white
entities.description: used as a carrier for invisible ink that becomes visible when treated with chemicals
entities.quote: the thin membrane is formed, and when mixed with albumen, it forms a soft substance from itself

entities.name: alum
entities.description: combined with gall nuts to create an impermeable ink that can be revealed by heat or chemical exposure
entities.quote: gall nuts crushed with alum, from which... almost impermeable substances arise

entities.name: gall nuts
entities.description: source of tannic acid used in invisible ink formulations
entities.quote: gall nuts crushed with alum, from which... almost impermeable substances arise

entities.name: vinegar
entities.description: used to treat the ink or paper to reveal hidden writing
entities.quote: when mixed with vinegar it becomes tender, through them penetrating

entities.name: paper
entities.description: surface on which invisible ink is applied and later revealed
entities.quote: the egg white... imprints on the egg white; this, when immersed in cold water and dried, reduces to its original form

entities.name: wood
entities.description: alternative surface for applying invisible ink using similar chemical methods
entities.quote: penetrate very hard wood, the depth of the characters of the woodcutters' tools

entities.name: Hittieus
entities.description: named individual referenced in relation to making indelible letters on the head
entities.quote: how Hittieus poterat capiti literas indelebiles facere

entities.name: Capuchin friar
entities.description: mentioned as a possible source of secret messages via bodily excretions, though likely garbled text
entities.quote: the natural philosopher's stone... the nuncius... capiti literas indelebiles

entities.name: invisible ink
entities.description: secret writing that is not visible to the naked eye and requires chemical treatment to reveal
entities.quote: the thin membrane... become visible with great clarity

entities.name: chemical revelation
entities.description: process of using substances like alum, vinegar, or heat to make invisible ink visible
entities.quote: when mixed with albumen... imprints on the egg white; this, when immersed in cold water and dried...
